name: @openvole/paw-prospect
description: Prospect & lead enrichment from a company website URL — structured profile + embedded dashboard panel.

tools.name: prospect_lookup
tools.description: Fetch a company website (URL or bare domain) and return a structured profile: name, tagline, description, logo, social links, detected tech, location, and key pages.

tools.name: prospect_history
tools.description: Recent prospect lookups (for the panel). action: 'list' | 'clear'.
